tasks.label: backend-api-validation
tasks.command: $projectPath = 'C:\Users\rreddy\Desktop\ppt_schedule'; $tasks = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/tasks' -Method Get; $tasks | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; foreach ($taskType in @('REPOSITORY_ANALYZER','DOCUMENTATION_GENERATOR','CODE_QUALITY_REPORT')) { $body = @{ taskType = $taskType; projectPath = $projectPath } | ConvertTo-Json; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/api/tasks/execute' -Method Post -ContentType 'application/json' -Body $body; $response | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 }

tasks.label: frontend-npm-registry-check
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; npm.cmd ping --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/; npm.cmd view @angular/core version --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/

tasks.label: frontend-angular-cli-check
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; ng version; npx.cmd -y @angular/cli@18.2.14 version

tasks.label: frontend-node-npm-check
tasks.command: Set-Location developer-workflow-ui; node -v; npm.cmd -v; npm.cmd config get registry
